---
title: "Matthew Huang"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthew-huang-67b835231/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Ambrois
listing:
  contents:
    - "projects/*/index.*"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false

---

#### Hello,

I'm a master's student in Applied Mathematics at UC Davis graduating in 2027. I also have a bachelor's in Statistics from Cal Poly SLO.

## Projects

***
